title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Roger, Oden, Unknown person #10, Orochi, Unknown person #11 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A year later...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And 24 years ago from now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden, who had received a foreign newspaper from Orochi...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ran across the beach, crying like a fool...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But his cries were inter- rusted by laughter

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WaHaha HahaHA haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: following the execution of the "pirate King", gold Roger...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Many people set out to sea, searching for the immense treasure he left behind...

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Roger!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And thus, the world entered the golden age of piracy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're really incredible!! What an incredible live you've lived!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Two years after Oden's return...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A fight broke out in Ringo between the "Gecko Pirates" and the "beasts Pirates"....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But even then...

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Oden Con- tinued to dance and...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only people who would still speak to him were his family and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you going to leave me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you joking? That's not funny!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: his retail-ners...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Oden, we would like to attend your dancing show every week! Kappappa~

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We don't wanna miss it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And the few allies he had left

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "idiot Lord" is still far too nice of a nickname for him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, you can't see the boss, idiot Lord!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: idiot

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, come inside and have a cup of tea

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hyogoro-san, open has arrived!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: This Orochi has no manners!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I will never be at his service!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Still, be careful, Hyogoro-san

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oden- chan

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Your dancing is steadily improving, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oh stop it, Okami- San!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Three years after Oden's return to Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The idiot Lord is back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Whoops!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: TA-DA, here's the snow

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: Four years after open's return to Wano...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: nothing had changed in the country...

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: You're Em- Barassing, Oden...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: But in the fifth year, Shogun Orochi...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: It's Shogun Orochi!!

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: began to act in Kuri

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: The Shogun has arrived in Kuri!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd like to build multiple factories in Kuri...

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: And I'm expecting your cooperation, Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: First I'd like to ask you, Shogun...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What about the boat? And what about Kaido?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Eh? What are you talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I told you, I want to transform Wano into a gigantic weapon factory...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And you know Hyogorogoro, right? He didn't want to comply...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I left him in Kaido's hands... he'll probably be killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: oh and the hag who followed him? We shot her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhahaha, the woman of the capital's hero was quite impudent!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oden- chan...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: The head of Wano's under- world

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hydoro of the flower was captured in the capital, causing his men to revolt

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You bastards, give back our boss!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The result: 16 of Hyogorogoro's men were killed, including his wife

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 60 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
